description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a combination of dark gray, brown, and olive green panels with a white rubber sole. The upper is constructed from what appears to be synthetic leather and textile, with reinforced stitching along the seams and a padded collar for ankle support. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with light gray laces and metal eyelets, and a round logo patch is visible on the outer ankle area. The tongue displays a branded label with a tricolor stripe detail, and the heel features an additional logo patch. The midsole is white and contrasts with the darker upper, while the outsole is only partially visible but appears to be flat and designed for urban use. Overall, the shoe is clean and shows no visible signs of wear, suggesting it is in new or like-new condition.
description: A high-top sneaker with a dark gray and brown upper, white sole, and visible logo patches, featuring a criss-cross lacing system and padded collar. The shoe appears clean and well-constructed, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, heel counter, and a logo patch centered on the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth side panel, ankle logo patch, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the criss-cross lacing, branded tongue label, and toe cap reinforcement.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible logo patch and layered material transitions.
attribute_logo: Round patch logo on outer ankle and rectangular patch on heel, both in gray/white.
